CustomSql.Name: match_lifecycle_funnel
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
SELECT '1_matchmaking_start' as stage_label, count(*) as event_count
FROM "<EVENTS_DATABASE>"."public"."event_data" events
WHERE events.payload.event.event_type::VARCHAR = 'matchmaking_start'
  AND timestamp 'epoch' + events.payload.event.event_timestamp::BIGINT * interval '1 second' >= dateadd(day, -30, getdate())
UNION ALL
SELECT '2_matchmaking_complete' as stage_label, count(*) as event_count
FROM "<EVENTS_DATABASE>"."public"."event_data" events
WHERE events.payload.event.event_type::VARCHAR = 'matchmaking_complete'
  AND timestamp 'epoch' + events.payload.event.event_timestamp::BIGINT * interval '1 second' >= dateadd(day, -30, getdate())
UNION ALL
SELECT '3_match_start' as stage_label, count(*) as event_count
FROM "<EVENTS_DATABASE>"."public"."event_data" events
WHERE events.payload.event.event_type::VARCHAR = 'match_start'
  AND timestamp 'epoch' + events.payload.event.event_timestamp::BIGINT * interval '1 second' >= dateadd(day, -30, getdate())
UNION ALL
SELECT '4_match_end' as stage_label, count(*) as event_count
FROM "<EVENTS_DATABASE>"."public"."event_data" events
WHERE events.payload.event.event_type::VARCHAR = 'match_end'
  AND timestamp 'epoch' + events.payload.event.event_timestamp::BIGINT * interval '1 second' >= dateadd(day, -30, getdate())
